name: Perfect Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your preferred bean variety (Pinto, navy, great northern White, etc.). Pick over the beans to remove rocks and any damaged beans.
2. Wash the beans and place them in a large pot with 1 cup of sugar and enough cold water to cover. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for at least 3 hours or until tender. Add additional water as needed.
3. Slice sausage and onion; dice garlic and peppers (adjust the number of peppers to your preference).
4. Add all remaining ingredients and cook beans for at least another hour, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed.
5. Ensure that the water is at least twice as deep as the beans when starting. After the beans have swollen, keep them just covered with liquid to prevent burning. If any accidental burning occurs, do not stir. Carefully pour off some of the liquid into another pot, avoiding burned particles, and continue cooking.
